title: The Commander Battles Intensify
description: On pages 1–4, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Kozuki Alliance, Unknown person #2, Tama, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4 as The Skull Dome battles reach their final forms as Sanji, Zoro, Kid, Law, Yamato, and the alliance push back against the emperors and their commanders.
scene: The Skull Dome battles reach their final forms as Sanji, Zoro, Kid, Law, Yamato, and the alliance push back against the emperors and their commanders.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's a pain to fly you around when I'm injured- you!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...About the giant yokai made me feel uneasy!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Where did a thing like that come from?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Try not get too sidetracked- You!

dialogue.speaker: Kozuki Alliance
dialogue.text: The Samurai are blocking the way out!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We'll be burned alive if we don't get to that floor!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I told you, I'm busy! quit following me!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: apoo, you don't know when to quit....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Woah!! It's one of the numbers!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I know it's been a while, but I'm in a hurry!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The flame yokai is heading for the lower levels of the castle!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: What in the world is that?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We don't know what it's after, but it keeps going down!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This must be the flame yokai they're talking about!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What the heck is that?! It's going down,

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 40 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on battle momentum, shifting alliances, and character resolve.
